# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: project_id
  type: gcp-types/core/v1:Project
  
- name: vpc
  type: cdk8s.aws.vpc2.VPC
  properties:
    maxAzs: 3 # use more than three AZ for high availability and scalability in a multiAZ setup, set to '0' if you are not using Multi-AVailability Zone deployments (MaaS) yet; defaults at '1'. The primary region of the account must support EC2 Placement Groups.
    subnetConfiguration: # list each tier and its cidr range here... for example [{tier=web,cidrBlock='10.56.34.0/18',natIPAllocationIdRefs:[]}, ...]  
    
- name: db_subnet  # database subnetwork resource definition (db)    -name 'project_id': cdk8s.aws::vpc2SubnetsType='auto'.cidrCount, defaults at '1', used with autoCreateSubnet option enabled to automatically create a new private IPv4 CIDR block in each availability zone of the specified project and region within this VPC 
- name: web_subnet # web subnetwork resource definition (web)   -name 'project_id': cdk8s.aws::vpc2SubnetsType='auto'.cidrCount, defaults at '1', used with autoCreateSubnet option enabled to automatically create a new private IPv4 CIDR block in each availability zone of the specified project and region within this VPC 
- name: mw_subnet # middleware subnetwork resource definition (mw) -name 'project_id': cdk8s.aws::vpc2SubnetsType='auto'.cidrCount, defaults at '1', used with autoCreateSubnet option enabled to automatically create a new private IPv4 CIDR block in each availability zone of the specified project and region within this VPC
